name: video-subtitle-translation
description: Generate bilingual or translated SRT subtitle files for CapCut/Jianying workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Generate bilingual SRT subtitles for editing apps.
interface.longDescription: Generate bilingual or translated-only SRT files from exported video or audio, with context-aware translation and meaning-aware sentence breaks that fit landscape and portrait videos. Import the SRT into CapCut/Jianying to continue styling and editing.
defaultPrompt: Create Chinese bilingual SRT subtitles for this video.
Translate this exported video into editable SRT subtitles.
Generate portrait-friendly bilingual subtitles for CapCut.
